mapper.select:
SELECT id, se_pump_equip_code, se_pump_name, se_pump_type, se_pump_status, se_pump_spec, se_pump_flow, se_pump_head, se_pump_rated_power, se_pump_rated_speed, se_pump_medium, se_pump_medium_temp, se_pump_design_p, se_pump_material, se_pump_seal_type, se_pump_explosion_proof, se_pump_motor_model, se_pump_install_pos, se_pump_in_service, se_pump_inspect_cycle, se_pump_last_inspect, se_pump_next_inspect, se_pump_inspect_result, se_pump_last_maintain, se_pump_next_maintain, se_pump_vibration, se_pump_leak_status, se_pump_maintain_record, se_pump_fault_record, se_pump_operator, se_pump_create_time, se_pump_update_time, se_pump_factory, se_pump_reserve1, se_pump_reserve2, se_pump_reserve3 FROM se_pump
and se_pump_equip_code like CONCAT( #{queryParams.sePumpEquipCode}, '%')
and se_pump_name like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.sePumpName}, '%')
and se_pump_type like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.sePumpType}, '%')
and se_pump_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.sePumpStatus}, '%')

SELECT id, se_pump_equip_code, se_pump_name, se_pump_type, se_pump_status, se_pump_spec, se_pump_flow, se_pump_head, se_pump_rated_power, se_pump_rated_speed, se_pump_medium, se_pump_medium_temp, se_pump_design_p, se_pump_material, se_pump_seal_type, se_pump_explosion_proof, se_pump_motor_model, se_pump_install_pos, se_pump_in_service, se_pump_inspect_cycle, se_pump_last_inspect, se_pump_next_inspect, se_pump_inspect_result, se_pump_last_maintain, se_pump_next_maintain, se_pump_vibration, se_pump_leak_status, se_pump_maintain_record, se_pump_fault_record, se_pump_operator, se_pump_create_time, se_pump_update_time, se_pump_factory, se_pump_reserve1, se_pump_reserve2, se_pump_reserve3 FROM se_pump
and se_pump_equip_code like CONCAT( #{sePumpEquipCode}, '%')
and se_pump_name like CONCAT ('%',#{sePumpName}, '%')
and se_pump_type like CONCAT ('%',#{sePumpType}, '%')
and se_pump_status like CONCAT ('%',#{sePumpStatus}, '%')
